landing.testimonial_1_quote: Finally something made for DMs at the table, not a monitor. My players love following along on their phones.
landing.testimonial_2_quote: Combat flows much faster now. I set up the encounter in 1 minute.
landing.testimonial_3_quote: The spell oracle saved my life mid-combat.

pricing.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need to.
pricing.faq_1_q: Can I use Pocket DM without paying?
pricing.faq_1_a: Yes! The Free plan includes the full combat tracker, the Oracle SRD with monsters and spells, and clickable dice. Perfect for one-off sessions.
pricing.faq_2_a: Yes. No commitment, no penalties. You keep Pro access until the end of your paid period.
pricing.faq_3_q: What happens if my subscription expires?
pricing.faq_3_a: Your data stays saved. You go back to the Free plan and can reactivate Pro whenever you want, without losing anything.

audio.error_limit: 6 audio limit reached. Remove one to add another.

lp_pricing.beta_banner: Open Beta — All Pro features are unlocked and free during the beta phase.

import.gate_disclaimer: I understand that Pocket DM does not own the content fetched at my request. Results come from public internet sources and are subject to availability from their respective maintainers. I take full responsibility for using this content.

tour.welcome_description: Let me guide you through setting up your first combat. It takes less than 2 minutes!
tour.search_description: Use this field to search for D&D monsters by name. Try typing 'Goblin'!
tour.add_monster_description: Click on a monster from the list to add it to the combat.
tour.monster_added_description: The Goblin has joined the initiative list. All combatants appear here with HP, AC, and initiative.
tour.monster_added_antimetagame: 🛡️ Anti-Metagame: each monster has two names — the real one (only you see) and the one visible to players. Tap the name to edit what players see.
tour.manual_add_description: You can also manually add players or custom NPCs using this row.
tour.initiative_description: Each combatant has an initiative value that determines turn order. Edit it by clicking the number, or use 'Roll All' / 'Roll NPCs' to roll automatically.
tour.start_description: All set! Click to start the combat and begin managing turns.
tour.controls_description: Here are the main controls: end combat, save session, and add new combatants mid-fight.
tour.hp_adjust_description: Click HP to apply damage/healing. Click the name to open the full stat block.
tour.next_turn_description: Click 'Next Turn' to move to the next combatant in initiative order. Drag to reorder.
tour.keyboard_description: Use Space to advance turn, +/- to quickly adjust HP, and drag combatants to reorder initiative.
tour.complete_description: Your combats disappear when the session expires. Create a free account to save everything, share with players in real time, and never lose a session.
tour.import_hint_description: Did you know you can access thousands of extra monsters from external sources? Tap here whenever you want to expand your library.

methodology.meta_title: Pocket DM Methodology — Data-Driven Difficulty Calculator
methodology.meta_description: We're building the most accurate D&D 5e encounter difficulty calculator, based on real combat data. Help calibrate the model by running encounters and rating difficulty.
methodology.headline: We're building the most accurate D&D difficulty calculator
methodology.subheadline: Based on real combat data, not static tables. Every session you run helps calibrate the model.
methodology.step_1_desc: Use the combat tracker normally with your party. Everything is recorded automatically.
methodology.step_2_desc: After combat, you and your players rate from 1 to 5. The DM also rates separately.
methodology.step_3_desc: Each vote calibrates the difficulty calculation for all DMs on the platform.
methodology.why_title: Why the DMG gets it wrong
methodology.why_subtitle: The DMG difficulty table uses static values that don't account for your table's reality.
methodology.compare_pdm_1: Real data from thousands of combats
methodology.cta_text: Every encounter you run contributes to a more accurate difficulty calculation for the entire community.
methodology.spell_teaser: Coming soon: Spell Tiers — Is Fireball tier S? Vote and find out.
methodology.lab_badge_tooltip: Pocket DM Methodology — Help the science of RPG
methodology.nudge_text: Your encounter fed the Pocket DM Methodology.
methodology.researcher_subtitle: Your {count} encounters are shaping the future of difficulty calculation.
